title: Cerulenin experiment
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"795td","text":"Rescue from Cerulenin Inhibition","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"p4sq","text":"Based on Saito, et al., 2018","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"36np6","text":"What you can expect: cerulenin addition with solvent control should inhibit growth completely forE. faecalis. However, you will see a few rounds of division, and then the cells “level-off” at an OD600 nm 0.1-0.3.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":197,"length":3}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a32ko","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9plil","text":"If the fatty acid can rescue from cerulenin, you should reach a similar OD600  nm value at the 24-hour mark as the control tube (cells with no antibiotic).  Note that in the case of the specific fatty acid or fatty acid combination, the cells may grow more slowly out of cerulenin inhibition (which is why the 24-hour recording is critical).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":74,"length":3}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4j5mu","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9m0lc","text":"Note, as of August 2019, no evidence for suppressors arising from this assay. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Grow strain of interest overnight in 5 ml BHI

The next day, set up the following tubes: Tube with no cerulenin Tube with cerulenin + solvent control (for fatty acid) Tube with cerulenin + fatty acid of interest For current studies, use 5mg/ml of cerulenin (note, can dissolve stock in 10 mg/ml ethanol) and 5ug/ml of fatty acid interested in testing. Perform in glass tubes with either 5 or 10 mL total volume
In am, dilute the strain to be an OD 600 nm of 0.01 into each of the above tubes. This is time “0”
Record the OD 600 nm at time 2, 4, 6, and 24 hours
Graph the results, making sure to add temporal separation in the graphs for the 24 hour time point.
creator: Eadewunm
